zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance dE PENTHIèVRE於1136年1月8日出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓瓦斯時，她的父親Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond36歲，母親Bertha Duchess of Brittany24歲。她和Alain III de Rohan至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1186年7月7日在法國布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: dE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance dE PENTHIèVRE was born on 8 January 1136, in Vannes, Morbihan, Brittany, France, her father, Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond, was 36 and her mother, Bertha Duchess of Brittany, was 24. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Alain III de Rohan. She died on 7 July 1186, in Rohan, Morbihan, Brittany, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance dE PENTHIèVRE est née le 8 janvier 1136, à Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Bertha Duchess of Brittany, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Alain III de Rohan. Elle est décédée le 7 juillet 1186, à Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance dE PENTHIèVRE am 8. Januar 1136 in Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond 36 und ihre Mutter Bertha Duchess of Brittany 24. Sie hatte mit Alain III de Rohan mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Juli 1186 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance dE PENTHIèVRE è nata il il 8 gennaio 1136 nel Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Bertha Duchess of Brittany, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Alain III de Rohan. Morì il 7 luglio 1186, nel Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance dE PENTHIèVREが1136年1月8日にフランスブレタグンモービハンヴァンスで生まれた時，父Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmondは36歳，母Bertha Duchess of Brittanyは24歳であった。彼女はAlain III de Rohanとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1186年7月7日にフランスブレタグンモービハンロハンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance dE PENTHIèVRE(이)가 1136년 1월 8일 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 버네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha Duchess of Brittany(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Alain III de Rohan(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1186년 7월 7일 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 로핸에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.8 January 1136–7 July 1186: 1136 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 8–1186 оны Долоодугаар сарын 7

pt.8 January 1136–7 July 1186: 8 de janeiro de 1136–7 de julho de 1186
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance dE PENTHIèVRE nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1136, em Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Bertha Duchess of Brittany, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Alain III de Rohan. Ela faleceu em 7 de julho de 1186, em Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance dE PENTHIèVRE родилась 8 января 1136 г. в местности ваннесь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertha Duchess of Brittany, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Alain III de Rohan. Она умерла 7 июля 1186 г. в местности рохань, морбихань, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

sm.from 1168 to 1195: mai le 1168 e o'o I le 1195

es.8 January 1136–7 July 1186: 8 de enero de 1136–7 de julio de 1186
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance dE PENTHIèVRE nació el 8 de enero de 1136, en Vannes, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Alan Penthièvre of Brittany 1st Earl of Richmond, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Bertha Duchess of Brittany, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Alain III de Rohan. Murió el 7 de julio de 1186, en Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
